items_fr: 9. Prie le  Comite special de continuer a rechercher les  meilleurs  moyens d'appliquer la  Declaration en ce qui concerne les Samoa americaines, y compris l'envoi eventuel d'une mission de visite en consultation avec la  Puissance  administrante,  et  de  faire  rapport  a l' Assemblee generate, lors de  sa trente-deuxieme ses› sion, sur l'application de la  presente resolution.
items_en: 9. Requests the Special Committee to continue to seek the best ways to implement the Declaration with regard to American Samoa, including the possible dispatch of a visiting mission in consultation with the administering Power, and to report to the General Assembly at its thirty-second session on the implementation of the present resolution.

text_fr: 85"  seance pleniere Jer decembre 1976
text_en: 85th plenary meeting Jer December 1976

text_fr: 31/56. Question du  Brunei
text_en: 31/56. Question by Brunei

text_fr: L' Assemblee generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Ayant examine la question du  Brunei,
text_en: Having considered the question of Brunei,

text_fr: Ayant examine le  chapitre pertinent du  rapport du Comite special charge d'etudier la situation en ce qui concerne l'application de la Declaration sur l'octroi de l'independance aux pays et aux peuples coloniaux 54 ,
text_en: Having considered the relevant chapter of the report of the Special Committee on the Situation with regard to the Implementation of the Declaration on the Granting of Independence to Colonial Countries and Peoples, 54/

text_fr: Rappe/ant sa resolution  1514  (XV)  du  14  decembre 1960, contenant  la  Declaration sur  l'octroi  de l'independance aux  pays  et  aux  peuples  coloniaux, ainsi  que d'autres resolutions et decisions pertinentes de l'Organisation des Nations Unies concernant le ter› ritoire,  y  compris,  notamment,  le  consensus  adopte sur  cette  question par I' Assemblee  generale  le 13  decembre  1974 55 ,
text_en: Recalling its resolution 1514 (XV) of 14 December 1960, containing the Declaration on the Granting of Independence to Colonial Countries and Peoples, as well as other relevant resolutions and decisions of the United Nations concerning the rule of law, including, inter alia, consensus on this matter adopted by the General Assembly on 13 December 1974, 55

text_fr: Rappe/ant egalement sa resolution  3424 (XXX) du 8 decembre  1975,
text_en: Recalling also its resolution 3424 (XXX) of 8 December 1975,

items_fr: 1. Reaffirme le droit  inalienable  du  peuple  du Brunei a l'autodetermination  et  a  l'independance, conformement  a  la Declaration sur  l'octroi  de l'independance aux pays et aux peuples coloniaux;

2. Approuve le chapitre  du  rapport  du  Comite special charge d'etudier la situation en ce qui concerne l' application de la Declaration sur  l' octroi de l'independance aux pays et aux peuples coloniaux re› latif au Brunei;
3. Note qu'aucun progres n'a ete realise jusqu'ici dans  l'application  de  la  resolution  3424 (XXX) de l' Assemblee generale;
4. Demande a toutes les parties interessees d'reuvrer  en  vue  de )'application  rapide de la resolution 3424 (XXX);

5. Demande  de  nouveau au  Gouvernement  du Royaume-Uni  de  Grande-Bretagne  et  d'lrlande  du Nord,  conformement a la  responsabilite  qui  lui  in› combe en tant que  Puissance administrante, de  pren› dre toutes les  mesures qui  relevent de  sa competence en vue de favoriser rapidement l'organisation d'elections libres  et  democratiques  par  Jes  autorites gouvernementales interessees au Brunei, en consulta› tion avec l'Organisation des Nations Unies et sous sa supervision,  conformement  au  droit  inalienable  du peuple du Brunei a l'autodetermination  et a l'independance,  et  demande  en  outre,  avant  les elections,  la  levee  de  l'interdiction de  tous  les  partis politiques et le  retour de  tous  les  exiles politiques au Brunei,  afin  qu'ils puissent  participer  librement  et pleinement aux elections;
6. Demande a la Puissance administrante, conformement  aux  dispositions  des  resolutions  per› tinentes de  l' Assemblee generale, de  cooperer pleine› ment avec le  Comite special;
7. Prie le  Co mite  special de  continuer a etudier la situation dans le  territoire et de faire rapport ace sujet a I' Assemblee  generale  !ors  de  sa  trente-deuxieme session.
items_en: 1. Reaffirms the inalienable right of the people of Brunei to self-determination and independence, in accordance with the Declaration on the Granting of Independence to Colonial Countries and Peoples;

2. Approves the chapter of the report of the Special Committee on the Situation with regard to the Implementation of the Declaration on the Granting of Independence to Colonial Countries and Peoples in Brunei;
3. Notes that no progress has been made so far in the implementation of General Assembly Resolution 3424 (XXX);
4. Requests all interested parties to work towards the early implementation of Resolution 3424 (XXX);

5. Reiterates its call upon the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, in accordance with its responsibility as administering Power, to take all measures within its competence with a view to rapidly promoting the organization of free and democratic elections by the Government authorities involved in Brunei, in consultation with and under its supervision with the United Nations, in accordance with the inalienable right of the people of Brunei to self-determination and independence, and further calls, before the elections, for the lifting of the ban on all political parties and the return of all political exiles to Brunei, so that they may participate freely and fully in the elections;
6. Calls upon the administering Power, in accordance with the provisions of the resolutions of the General Assembly, to cooperate fully with the Special Committee;
7. Requests the Special Committee to continue its consideration of the situation in the Territory and to report thereon to the General Assembly at its thirty-second session.

text_fr: 31/ 57. Question des iles Vierges americaines
text_en: 31/ 57. Question of the American Virgin Islands

text_fr: L'Assemblec f?eneralc,
text_en: The Assemblec f?eneralc,

text_fr: Ayant  examine la question des iles Vierges americaines,
text_en: Having considered the question of the American Virgin Islands,

text_fr: Ayant examine Jes  chapitres  pertinents  du  rapport du  Comite special  charge d'etudier la  situation en ce qui concerne  l'application  de  la Declaration  sur l'octroi de l'independance aux pays et aux peuples co› loniaux56,
text_en: Having examined my relevant chapters of the report of the Special Committee on the Situation with regard to the Implementation of the Declaration on the Granting of Independence to Colonial Countries and Peoples,56

text_fr: Rappe/ant sa  resolution  1514 (XV) du  14  decembre 1960, con tenant la Declaration sur  I' octroi de l'independance aux  pays  et  aux  peuples  coloniaux, ainsi  que toutes  Jes  autres resolutions et decisions de !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies concernant Jes  iles Vierges americaines,
text_en: Recalling its Resolution 1514 (XV) of 14 December 1960, containing the Declaration on the Granting of Independence to Colonial Countries and Peoples, as well as all other United Nations resolutions and decisions concerning the American Virgin Islands,

text_fr: Conscicnte de  la  necessite d'accelerer Jes  progres en vue de  l'application complete de  la  Declaration en ce qui  concerne Jes  iles  Vierges  americaines,
text_en: Conscious of the need to accelerate Jes progres with a view to the full implementation of the Declaration with regard to the American Virgin Islands,

text_fr: Ayant presents a I' esprit Jes  resultats  constructifs obtenus  grace  aux  missions  de visite envoyees precedemment dans  des territoires  non autonomes et reaffirmant sa conviction que l'envoi de telles missions est indispensable pour obtenir directement des rensei› gnements adequats sur Jes  conditions qui  existent dans ces territoires, ainsi  que  sur Jes  vues, Jes  vreux  et Jes aspirations de leur population quanta leur statut futur,
text_en: Having submitted in mind my constructive results obtained through visiting missions sent earlier to Non-Self-Governing Territories and reaffirming its conviction that the dispatch of such missions is indispensable in order to obtain directly adequate information on the conditions which exist in those territories, as well as on the views, hopes and aspirations of their people as to their future status,

text_fr: Sachant que I'attention et !'assistance soutenues de l'Organisation  des  Nations  Unies  sont  necessaires pour  que  la  population  des  iles  Vierges  americaines atteigne  Jes  objectifs enonces  dans la  Charte des  Na› tions  Unies et dans la  Declaration,
text_en: Aware that the sustained attention and assistance of the United Nations is necessary for the people of the American Virgin Islands to achieve their objectives in the Charter of the United Nations and in the Declaration,

text_fr: Conscientc de  la  situation geographique et des con› ditions  economiques  particulieres  du  territoire  et soulignant  la  necessite  prioritaire  de  diversifier  son economie  afin  de  reduire  sa  dependance  a  l'egard d'activites economiques fluctuantes,
text_en: Aware of the geographical situation and the special economic conditions of the territory and stressing the priority need to diversify its economy in order to reduce its dependence on fluctuating economic activities,

items_fr: I. Approuve le chapitre  du  rapport  du  Comite special charge d'etudier la situation en ce qui concerne l' application de la Declaration sur I' octroi de l'independance aux pays et aux peuples coloniaux re› latif aux iles Vierges americaines 57 ;
2. Reaffirmc le  droit inalienable du peuple des iles Vierges americaines a I' autodetermination et a l'independance, conformement a la  Declaration;
3. Reaffirmc  sa  conviction que  Jes  questions  de superficie, de  situation geographique et de  ressources
items_en: I. Approves the chapter of the report of the Special Committee on the Situation with regard to the Implementation of the Declaration on the Granting of Independence to Colonial Countries and Peoples relating to the United States Virgin Islands 57;
2. Reaffirms the inalienable right of the people of the American Virgin Islands to selfdetermination and independence, in accordance with the Declaration;
3. Reaffirms its conviction that I have questions of area, geographical location and resources

text_fr: Conscient  e de la necessite d'accelerer Jes progres en vue de l'apr ,lication complete de la Declaration en ce qui concerr 1e  Guam,
text_en: Aware of the need to accelerate progress towards the completion of the declaration with regard to Guam,

text_fr: Deplorar zt la  politique  de  la  Puissance  adminis› trante,  qu .i continue a maintenir  des  installations militaires a Guam en violation  des  resolutions  per› tinentes d .e  I' Assemblee generate,
text_en: Deplores the policy of the administering Power, which continues to maintain military installations in Guam in violation of the permanent resolutions of the General Assembly,

text_fr: Ayant  presents a /' esprit les  resultats  constructifs obtenus grace  aux  missions  de  visite  envoyees preceder nment  dans  les territoires coloniaux  et reaffirm; mt sa conviction que l'envoi de telles missions est indis ,pensable pour obtenir directement des rensei› gnemen ts adequats sur les conditions qui existent dans ces terr itoires, ainsi que sur les vues, Jes  vreux et Jes aspirati  ons de leur population quant a leur statut futur,
text_en: Having presented the constructive results obtained thanks to the visiting missions sent previously to colonial territories and reaffirms its conviction that sending such missions is indispensable to obtain directly adequate information on the conditions which exist in these territories, as well as on the views, Jes vreux and Jes aspirati on their population as to their future status,

text_fr: Sach 1ant que !'attention et !'assistance soutenues de l'Orga· nisation  des  Nations  Unies  soot  necessaires pour c 1ue  la  population de  Guam atteigne les objectifs enonc es dans la  Charte des  Nations Unies et dans la Decla ration,
text_en: Since the sustained attention and assistance of the United Nations Organization necessary for the people of Guam to achieve the objectives set out in the Charter of the United Nations and in the Declaration,

text_fr: Cm isciente de  la  situation geographique et des con› dition 1s  economiques  parti culieres  de  Guam et  souli› gnant la necessite prioritaire  de diversifier son econc  )mie  afin  de  reduire  sa  dependance a l'egard d'act ivites economiques fluctuantes,
text_en: Cm isciente de la situation géographique et des conditions 1s économiques partici aires de Guam et relieving the priority need to diversify its econ omie in order to reduce its dependence on fluctuating economic activities,

items_fr: l. Approuve le  chapitre  du  rapport  du  Comite speci ial charge d'etudier la situation en ce qui concerne l'apr >lication de la Declaration  sur  l'octroi  de l'ind iependance aux pays et aux peuples coloniaux re› latif a Guam 59 ;
2 . Reaffirme le droit  inalienable  du  peuple  de Gu: am a l'autodetermin:ation  et a l'independance, cor 1formement a la  Declarration;

: J. Reaffirme  sa  conviction que  les  questions  de su· perficie, de situation 'geographique et de ressources lin nitees ne doivent en  aucune far;on retarder l'r tpplication de la Dedaration au territoire;

4. Demande au  Gouvernement  des  Etats-Unis d' 'Amerique, en tant. que Puissance administrante, de continuer a prendr·e,  en  consultation  avec  les r epresentants librem ent elus de  la  population, toutes l .es  mesures  necess aires  pour  assurer  la  realisation , complete  et  rapidi:  des  objectifs  enonces  dans  la Declaration en ce qui conceme Guam;

5. Desapprouv,e fortement l'etablissement a Guam d'installations  mi'Jitaires,  comme  etant  incompatible avec  les  buts  et  principes  de  la  Charte  des  Nations Unies  et  de  la  r·esolution  1514  (XV)  de  l'Assemblee generate;

6. Demande a la Puissance administrante de pren› dre toutes Jes  o,1esures  possibles en vue de diversifier l'economie du 1 territoire et d'elaborer des programmes concrets d'ass istance et de  developpement economi› que pour Gua· m;

7. Deman,de a la  Puissance  administrante  de  re› venir sur son  attitude en ce qui  conceme l'accueil de missions de \/isite de l'Organisation des Nations Unies et de permet 1 tre a une telle mission l'acces au territoire;

8. Prie i nstamment la  Puissance administrante de sauvegarde· r, en cooperation avec le Gouvemement de Guam, le  d ,roit inalienable de  la population de  ce ter› ritoire de jouir de ses ressources nature Iles, en prenant
items_en: l. Approves the chapter of the report of the Special Committee on the Situation with regard to the Implementation of the Declaration on the Granting of Independence to Colonial Countries and Peoples in Guam; 59
2 . Reaffirms the inalienable right of the people of Gu: am to selfdetermination and independence, in the form of declaration;
J. Reaffirms its conviction that the questions of sovereignty, geographical status and natural resources must in no way delay the application of the Dedaration to the territory;

4. Calls upon the Government of the United States of America, as the administering Power, to continue to take all necessary measures, in consultation with the free representatives of the population, to ensure the achievement, completeness and promptness of the objectives set out in the Declaration in relation to Guam;

5. Strongly endorses the establishment in Guam of semi-judicial facilities as incompatible with the purposes and principles of the Charter of the United Nations and resolution 1514 (XV) of the General Assembly;

6. Calls upon the administering Power to take all possible steps to diversify the economy of the Territory and to develop concrete programmes of assistance and economic development as well as for Gua·m;
7. To the administering Power to come back to its attitude regarding the hosting of United Nations missions and to allow such a mission to the Territory;
8. Requests the administering Power, in cooperation with the Guam Government, to ensure that the people of Guam enjoy their natural resources in accordance with the provisions of this Treaty.

text_fr: limitees ne doivent en aucune  far;on retarder !'application de la Declaration au territoire;
text_en: the application of the Declaration to the territory;

items_fr: 4. Demande au  Gouvernement  des  Etats-Unis d' Amerique, en tant que Puissance administrante, de continuer a prendre,  en  consultation  avec  les representants librement elus de la population, toutes les  mesures  necessaires  pour  assurer  la  realisation complete  et  rapide  des  objectifs  enonces  dans  la Declaration  en  ce  qui  concerne  les  iles  Vierges americaines;

5. Demande a la Puissance administrante de pren› dre toutes les mesures possibles en vue de diversifier l'economie du territoire et d'elaborer des programmes concrets  d'assistance  et  de  developpement  econo› mique pour les iles Vierges americaines;

6. Prie la  Puissance  administrante  d'envisager favorablement  d'inviter  une  mission  des  Nations Unies a se  rendre  dans  les  iles  Vierges  americaines pour observer la situation dans le  territoire et prendre directement connaissance des aspirations de la popula› tion quant a son statut politique;

7. Prie instamment la  Puissance administrante de sauvegarder, en cooperation avec le Gouvernement du territoire, le  droit inalienable de la population du ter› ritoire de jouir de ses ressources naturelles, en prenant des  mesures  efficaces  pour garantir le  droit de  cette population de  disposer en toute propriete de ces res› sources  nature lies  et  d' exercer  et  de  conserver  la maitrise de leur mise en valeur future;

8. Prie la Puissance administrante de continuer a demander l'aide des institutions specialisees et des au› tres  organismes  des  Nations Unies pour accelerer le progres dans tous les secteurs de la vie nationale des iles  Vierges americaines;

9. Prie le  Comite special de continuer a rechercher les  meilleurs moyens d'appliquer la Declaration en ce qui  conceme les iles  Vierges  americaines,  y  compris l'envoi eventuel d'une mission  de visite en consulta› tion avec la Puissance administrante, et de faire rap› port a l' Assemblee  generate,  lors  de  sa  trente› deuxieme  session,  sur  !'application  de  la  presente resolution.
items_en: 4. Calls upon the Government of the United States of America, as the administering Power, to continue to take all necessary measures, in consultation with the freely elected representatives of the population, to ensure the full and speedy realization of the objectives set out in the Declaration with regard to the American Virgin Islands;

5. Calls upon the administering Power to take all possible measures to diversify the economy of the Territory and to develop concrete programmes of economic assistance and development for the American Virgin Islands;

6. Requests the administering Power to consider favourably inviting a United Nations mission to visit the United States Virgin Islands to observe the situation in the Territory and to learn directly about the aspirations of the people regarding their political status;

7. Urges the administering Power to safeguard, in cooperation with the territorial Government, the inalienable right of the people of the Territory to enjoy their natural resources, by taking effective measures to guarantee the right of the people of the Territory to dispose of such natural resources in full ownership and to exercise and maintain the mastery of their future development;

8. Requests the administering Power to continue to seek the assistance of the specialized agencies and other organizations of the United Nations system in accelerating progress in all areas of the national life of the United States Virgin Islands;

9. Requests the Special Committee to continue to seek the best means of implementing the Declaration with regard to the American Virgin Islands, including the possible dispatch of a visiting mission to consult with the administering Power, and to report to the General Assembly at its thirty-second session on the implementation of the present resolution.

text_fr: L' Assemblee generate,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Ayant examine la question de Guam,
text_en: Having considered the question of Guam,

text_fr: Ayant examine les  chapitres pertinents du  rapport du Comite special charge d'etudier la  situation en ce qui  conceme  l'application  de  la  Declaration  sur l'octroi de l'independance aux pays et aux peuples co› loniaux58,
text_en: Having examined the relevant chapters of the report of the Special Committee on the Situation with regard to the implementation of the Declaration on the Granting of Independence to Colonial Countries and Peoples,58

text_fr: Rappe/ant sa resolution  1514 (XV) du  14  decembre! 1960, contenant  la  Declaration  sur  l'octroi  d,e l'independance aux  pays  et  aux  peuples  coloniauH, ainsi que toutes les autres resolutions et decisions c Je l'Organisation des  Nations Unies concemant Guar n, en  particulier ses resolutions 3429 (XXX) , du 8  decembre 1975 et 3481 (XXX) du 11  decembre 197 5,
text_en: Repe/ant its Resolution 1514 (XV) of 14 December 1960, containing the Declaration on the Granting of Independence to Colonial Countries and Peoples, as well as all other resolutions and decisions c I the United Nations concerning Guar n, in particular its Resolutions 3429 (XXX) of 8 December 1975 and 3481 (XXX) of 11 December 197 5,
